entries.definition:
ʿ–n–w to be humble, to be subservient, to yield, to show
humility, to submit, to humble oneself; to take by force, force, to
take as prisoner of war, to be imprisoned; to show interest; to take
something; to mean, meaning; title. Of this root, only عَنَت ʿana(t)
occurs once in the Qur’an.

عَنَا ʿanā u [v. intrans.] to become servile, to become humble,
to be lowly; to become submissive, to bow (20:111) وَعَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ
لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ faces will become humble (or, downcast) before the
Living, Eternal One.
